backgrounds.description: Top-down fantasy world map with three biome zones centered and connected by winding paths, surrounded by decorative wilderness filler

heroes.description: Young male adventurer with short dark hair, determined expression, leather armor with a short sword at his belt, blue magical aura
Female ranger with auburn hair in a braid, sharp green eyes, forest-green hooded cloak, bow slung over shoulder, nature motif
Androgynous mage with silver-white hair, pale skin, ornate purple robes with golden trim, glowing arcane staff, ethereal presence

ingredients.description: A luminous white-silver flower petal that glows faintly with moonlight, delicate curved shape
A clump of soft green moss with glistening dew droplets, lush and damp
A smooth round ball of reddish-brown river clay, slightly wet with a matte finish
A small pile of shimmering copper-orange metallic dust with green patina flecks
A cluster of small dark purple-black berries with a faint inner glow, attached to a dark stem
A patch of deep crimson-red lichen growing on grey stone, branching fractal pattern
A small glass vial containing swirling pale blue-white fog that moves on its own
A small heap of dark grey metallic iron filings with a magnetic sheen
A gnarled root that looks half-petrified, grey-brown with stone-like texture and living tendrils
A drop of golden-amber tree sap, translucent and warm-glowing, suspended in mid-drip
A sharp faceted crystal shard glowing amber-gold, translucent with internal light
Dark emerald moss with tiny scale-like leaves, faintly warm to the touch, dragon-fire residue
A bright yellow crystalline flower-like sulfur formation with sharp geometric petals
A wisp of pure black silk thread that seems to absorb light, floating ethereally
A single drop of luminous green-yellow venom, viscous and glowing with toxic energy
A pinch of shimmering red-orange ash with embedded ember sparks that still glow
Dark crystalline salt grains that appear to contain tiny starfields within each crystal
A single droplet of liquid starlight, brilliant white-blue with prismatic refractions
A razor-thin flake of volcanic obsidian glass, jet black with iridescent purple edge
A coiled tendril of ghostly translucent vine, pale green with spectral glow
A single large iridescent dragon scale, deep purple with rainbow shimmer, thick and armored
A small orb of concentrated purple-white aether energy, crackling with arcane lightning
A vial of thick luminous magenta-red blood that pulses with inner power
A pinch of sparkling cosmic dust with tiny stars and nebula colors within
A dark lustrous pearl with deep purple-black surface and an inner void-like glow

potions.description: A round glass potion bottle filled with glowing red liquid, heart-shaped stopper, warm crimson glow
A tall angular potion bottle filled with electric blue liquid, sword-shaped stopper, crackling energy
A bulbous potion bottle filled with verdant green liquid, leaf-shaped stopper, gentle healing glow
A crude wooden bowl of murky brown-grey soup with lazy steam, failed alchemy experiment

branding.description: ATHANOR game logo — alchemical serif text in molten gold on black
Loading screen background — dark alchemist sanctum with glowing athanor furnace
